summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Development OS platform - all core features working correctly

Client auth page (/client/auth) - registration and login forms work

Admin login page (/admin/login) - admin authentication interface available
Demo access API (/api/auth/demo) - creates temporary users for all roles
Client dashboard accessible after login and demo access
Developer dashboard accessible after login and demo access
Admin dashboard accessible after demo access
User registration API (/api/auth/register) working correctly
User login API (/api/auth/login) working correctly
Portfolio cases API returning data
Featured cases API working
Root API endpoint responding
Authentication flow with proper redirects
All CTA buttons functional and properly linked
Navigation elements working correctly
Form validation and submission working
Session management and cookies working
Real-time features integrated (Socket.IO setup confirmed)
